g.text: How the version on the image tag is computed
Conventional Commits → semver state machine. Humans write commit messages; a tool (semantic-release, release-please) derives the version. No human picks the number.
all commits merged to main since the previous release tag
as audit row in release DB
The (version, digest, commit-sha) triple is the rollback audit trail. 'Deploy v2.4.0' becomes a digest lookup that is deterministic forever — not a tag lookup that depends on what was re-pushed last.
